name: Deduction for Unrecovered Investment at Death

eligibility.description: Available when annuity payments cease due to the death of the annuitant and there is remaining unrecovered investment in the contract.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a deduction on the annuitant's final tax return if they die before recovering their entire investment in the annuity contract.
